title: Roasted Ukrainian Dough Flatbread
description: A crispy and spicy Ukrainian flatbread made with a double-rise dough, perfect for a lazy Sunday meal. This bread is vegan and can be cooked on a binchotan grill.
instructions: Combine warm water and yeast in a large bowl, let it sit for 5 minutes until frothy.
Add salt, flour, mixed spice, and vegetable oil to the bowl, mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Let the dough rise in a warm place for 1 hour, until it has doubled in size.
Punch down the dough and divide it into 4-6 equal pieces, depending on how large you want your flatbreads to be.
Roll out each piece of dough into a thin circle, about 1/8 inch thick.
Heat a binchotan grill to medium-high heat, cook the flatbreads for 2-3 minutes per side, until crispy and slightly charred.
Brush the flatbreads with hot sauce while still warm, garnish with chopped parsley.
